---
title: "Object 2 - Iron Condor"
author: 
date: "2026-03-23"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

rm(list = ls())
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(purrr)
library(here)
```

```{r}
Sys.setenv(TZ = "America/New_York")

# spy_file <- "spy_etf_train.csv"
# opt_file <- "spy_opt_train.csv"

spy_file <- "spy_etf_test.csv"
opt_file <- "spy_opt_test.csv"

spy_df <- read_csv(here(spy_file), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    timestamp = with_tz(timestamp, "America/New_York"),
    date = as.Date(timestamp)
  ) %>%
  arrange(timestamp)

opt_df <- read_csv(here(opt_file), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    timestamp = with_tz(timestamp, "America/New_York"),
    type = toupper(type),
    date = as.Date(timestamp)
  ) %>%
  arrange(timestamp, type, strike)

entry_time_fixed      <- "10:30:00"
force_exit_time       <- "15:00:00"
exit_check_every_mins <- 20

wing_width <- 1

min_credit  <- 0.02
iv_rv_ratio <- 1.00
r           <- 0.05

take_profit_pct <- 0.50
stop_loss_mult  <- 1.50
exit_on_touch   <- TRUE
```



```{r}
get_time_slice <- function(df, start_time, end_time) {
  df %>%
    filter(
      format(timestamp, "%H:%M:%S") >= start_time,
      format(timestamp, "%H:%M:%S") <= end_time
    )
}

calc_log_rv <- function(prices) {
  if (length(prices) < 2) return(NA_real_)
  log_ret <- diff(log(prices))
  sqrt(sum(log_ret^2, na.rm = TRUE))
}

get_nearest_snapshot <- function(df, trade_date, target_time) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(df[0, ])

  target_dt <- ymd_hms(
    paste(as.character(trade_date), target_time),
    tz = "America/New_York"
  )

  df %>%
    mutate(min_diff = abs(as.numeric(difftime(timestamp, target_dt, units = "mins")))) %>%
    filter(min_diff == min(min_diff, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    select(-min_diff)
}

calc_intraday_T <- function(current_time, market_close = "16:00:00") {
  fake_date <- "2026-01-01"

  t1 <- ymd_hms(paste(fake_date, current_time), tz = "America/New_York")
  t2 <- ymd_hms(paste(fake_date, market_close), tz = "America/New_York")

  remaining_minutes <- as.numeric(difftime(t2, t1, units = "mins"))
  remaining_minutes <- max(remaining_minutes, 1)

  remaining_minutes / (252 * 390)
}

pick_nearest_strike <- function(df, target_strike, opt_type) {
  df %>%
    filter(type == opt_type) %>%
    mutate(dist = abs(strike - target_strike)) %>%
    arrange(dist, strike) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    select(-dist)
}

make_time_grid <- function(start_time, end_time, by_mins) {
  fake_date <- "2026-01-01"
  t1 <- ymd_hms(paste(fake_date, start_time), tz = "America/New_York")
  t2 <- ymd_hms(paste(fake_date, end_time), tz = "America/New_York")

  grid <- seq(t1, t2, by = paste(by_mins, "mins"))
  format(grid, "%H:%M:%S")
}

shift_time_str <- function(time_str, mins_shift) {
  fake_date <- "2026-01-01"
  t <- ymd_hms(paste(fake_date, time_str), tz = "America/New_York")
  t_new <- t + minutes(mins_shift)
  format(t_new, "%H:%M:%S")
}
```

```{r}
# implied volatility
bs_price <- function(S, K, r, T, sigma, type) {

  d1 <- (log(S / K) + (r + 0.5 * sigma^2) * T) / (sigma * sqrt(T))
  d2 <- d1 - sigma * sqrt(T)

  if (type == "C") {
    S * pnorm(d1) - K * exp(-r * T) * pnorm(d2)
  } else if (type == "P") {
    K * exp(-r * T) * pnorm(-d2) - S * pnorm(-d1)
  }
}

bs_implied_vol <- function(option_price, S, K, r, T, type) {

  iv_fun <- function(sigma) {
    bs_price(S, K, r, T, sigma, type) - option_price
  }
  tryCatch(
    uniroot(iv_fun, lower = 1e-4, upper = 3)$root,
    error = function(e) NA_real_
  )
}

add_bs_iv <- function(df, S, r, T) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      iv_bs = pmap_dbl(
        list(close, strike, type),
        function(close, strike, type) {
          bs_implied_vol(
            option_price = close,
            S = S,
            K = strike,
            r = r,
            T = T,
            type = type
          )
        }
      )
    )
}
```

```{r}
# condor pricing
get_leg_price <- function(snapshot, strike_i, type_i) {
  row_i <- snapshot %>%
    filter(strike == strike_i, type == type_i)

  if (nrow(row_i) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  row_i$close[1]
}

get_condor_exit_debit <- function(snapshot, K_sp, K_lp, K_sc, K_lc) {
  sp <- get_leg_price(snapshot, K_sp, "P")
  lp <- get_leg_price(snapshot, K_lp, "P")
  sc <- get_leg_price(snapshot, K_sc, "C")
  lc <- get_leg_price(snapshot, K_lc, "C")

  if (any(is.na(c(sp, lp, sc, lc)))) return(NA_real_)

  # buy back shorts, sell longs
  sp - lp + sc - lc
}
```

```{r}

# 7. ENTRY CHECK AT FIXED TIME
check_entry_at_time <- function(test_day, time_i, spy_day, opt_day) {
  start_60 <- shift_time_str(time_i, -60)
  start_30 <- shift_time_str(time_i, -30)
  spy_60 <- get_time_slice(spy_day, start_60, time_i)
  spy_30 <- get_time_slice(spy_day, start_30, time_i)
  rv_60 <- calc_log_rv(spy_60$close)
  rv_30 <- calc_log_rv(spy_30$close)

  vol_cooling <- rv_30 < rv_60

  spy_entry <- get_nearest_snapshot(spy_day, test_day, time_i)

  S_entry <- spy_entry$close[1]

  opt_entry <- get_nearest_snapshot(opt_day, test_day, time_i)

  available_strikes <- sort(unique(opt_entry$strike))
  if (length(available_strikes) < 4) return(NULL)

  T_remain <- calc_intraday_T(time_i, "16:00:00")

  # use BSM to compute IV for every option at entry
  opt_entry <- add_bs_iv(opt_entry, S = S_entry, r = r, T = T_remain)

  # pick short strikes
  target_put_strike  <- S_entry * (1 - rv_60*sqrt(390/60))
  target_call_strike <- S_entry * (1 + rv_60*sqrt(390/60))

  short_put  <- pick_nearest_strike(opt_entry, target_put_strike, "P")
  short_call <- pick_nearest_strike(opt_entry, target_call_strike, "C")

  if (nrow(short_put) == 0 || nrow(short_call) == 0) return(NULL)

  K_sp <- short_put$strike[1]
  K_sc <- short_call$strike[1]

# pick long strikes
  strike_diffs <- diff(available_strikes)
  strike_step <- median(strike_diffs[strike_diffs > 0], na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(strike_step)) strike_step <- 1

  target_long_put  <- K_sp - wing_width * strike_step
  target_long_call <- K_sc + wing_width * strike_step

  long_put  <- pick_nearest_strike(opt_entry, target_long_put, "P")
  long_call <- pick_nearest_strike(opt_entry, target_long_call, "C")

  if (nrow(long_put) == 0 || nrow(long_call) == 0) return(NULL)

  K_lp <- long_put$strike[1]
  K_lc <- long_call$strike[1]

  if (K_lp >= K_sp) return(NULL)
  if (K_lc <= K_sc) return(NULL)

  # use BSM IV of the actual short legs
  iv_short_put  <- short_put$iv_bs[1]
  iv_short_call <- short_call$iv_bs[1]
  iv_long_put   <- long_put$iv_bs[1]
  iv_long_call  <- long_call$iv_bs[1]

  if (any(!is.finite(c(iv_short_put, iv_short_call, iv_long_put, iv_long_call)))) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  avg_short_iv <- mean(c(iv_short_put, iv_short_call))
  avg_long_iv  <- mean(c(iv_long_put, iv_long_call))

  # entry signal:
  # 1) vol cooling
  # 2) actual short-leg IV is rich relative to realized vol
  # 3) short-leg IV should also be >= long-leg IV
  signal_trade <- vol_cooling &&
    (avg_short_iv > iv_rv_ratio * rv_60*sqrt(390*252/ 60)) &&
    (avg_short_iv >= avg_long_iv)

  if (!signal_trade) return(NULL)

  premium_short_put  <- short_put$close[1]
  premium_short_call <- short_call$close[1]
  premium_long_put   <- long_put$close[1]
  premium_long_call  <- long_call$close[1]

  entry_credit <- premium_short_put + premium_short_call -
    premium_long_put - premium_long_call

  if (is.na(entry_credit) || entry_credit < min_credit) return(NULL)

  tibble(
    date = test_day,
    entry_time = time_i,
    S_entry = S_entry,
    rv_60 = rv_60,
    rv_30 = rv_30,
    short_put_iv = iv_short_put,
    short_call_iv = iv_short_call,
    avg_short_iv = avg_short_iv,
    avg_long_iv = avg_long_iv,
    short_put = K_sp,
    long_put = K_lp,
    short_call = K_sc,
    long_call = K_lc,
    short_put_price = premium_short_put,
    long_put_price = premium_long_put,
    short_call_price = premium_short_call,
    long_call_price = premium_long_call,
    entry_credit = entry_credit
  )
}

find_fixed_entry <- function(test_day, spy_day, opt_day) {
  out <- check_entry_at_time(
    test_day = test_day,
    time_i = entry_time_fixed,
    spy_day = spy_day,
    opt_day = opt_day
  )

  if (is.null(out) || nrow(out) == 0) return(NULL)
  out
}
```

```{r}
# Exit signal


find_dynamic_exit <- function(entry_row, test_day, spy_day, opt_day) {
  entry_time_i <- entry_row$entry_time[1]

  exit_grid <- make_time_grid(
    start_time = shift_time_str(entry_time_i, exit_check_every_mins),
    end_time   = force_exit_time,
    by_mins    = exit_check_every_mins
  )

  K_sp <- entry_row$short_put[1]
  K_lp <- entry_row$long_put[1]
  K_sc <- entry_row$short_call[1]
  K_lc <- entry_row$long_call[1]
  entry_credit <- entry_row$entry_credit[1]

  for (time_i in exit_grid) {
    spy_now <- get_nearest_snapshot(spy_day, test_day, time_i)
    opt_now <- get_nearest_snapshot(opt_day, test_day, time_i)
    S_now <- spy_now$close[1]
    exit_debit <- get_condor_exit_debit(opt_now, K_sp, K_lp, K_sc, K_lc)
    if (is.na(exit_debit)) next

    pnl_now <- entry_credit - exit_debit

    take_profit_hit <- pnl_now >= take_profit_pct * entry_credit
    stop_loss_hit <- pnl_now <= -stop_loss_mult * entry_credit
    touch_hit <- exit_on_touch && (S_now <= K_sp || S_now >= K_sc)

    if (take_profit_hit || stop_loss_hit || touch_hit) {
      reason <- case_when(
        take_profit_hit ~ "take_profit",
        stop_loss_hit   ~ "stop_loss",
        touch_hit       ~ "short_strike_touch",
        TRUE            ~ "other"
      )

      return(
        tibble(
          exit_time = time_i,
          S_exit = S_now,
          exit_debit = exit_debit,
          pnl = pnl_now,
          exit_reason = reason
        )
      )
    }
  }

  spy_force <- get_nearest_snapshot(spy_day, test_day, force_exit_time)
  opt_force <- get_nearest_snapshot(opt_day, test_day, force_exit_time)

  S_force <- spy_force$close[1]
  exit_debit_force <- get_condor_exit_debit(opt_force, K_sp, K_lp, K_sc, K_lc)

  pnl_force <- entry_credit - exit_debit_force

  tibble(
    exit_time = force_exit_time,
    S_exit = S_force,
    exit_debit = exit_debit_force,
    pnl = pnl_force,
    exit_reason = "forced_exit"
  )
}


# run one day
run_condor_one_day_simple <- function(test_day, spy_df, opt_df) {
  spy_day <- spy_df %>% filter(date == test_day)
  opt_day <- opt_df %>% filter(date == test_day)

  entry_row <- find_fixed_entry(test_day, spy_day, opt_day)
  if (is.null(entry_row) || nrow(entry_row) == 0) return(NULL)

  exit_row <- find_dynamic_exit(entry_row, test_day, spy_day, opt_day)
  if (is.null(exit_row) || nrow(exit_row) == 0) return(NULL)

  bind_cols(entry_row, exit_row) %>%
    mutate(
      hold_minutes = as.numeric(
        difftime(
          ymd_hms(paste(as.character(date), exit_time), tz = "America/New_York"),
          ymd_hms(paste(as.character(date), entry_time), tz = "America/New_York"),
          units = "mins"
        )
      ),
      pnl = pnl * 100,
    entry_credit = entry_credit * 100,
    exit_debit = exit_debit * 100
    )
}


# backtest
trading_days <- sort(unique(spy_df$date))

trade_results <- map_dfr(
  trading_days,
  ~ run_condor_one_day_simple(.x, spy_df, opt_df)
)
```

```{r}
# result
if (nrow(trade_results) > 0) {

  trade_results <- trade_results %>%
    arrange(date) %>%
    mutate(cumulative_pnl = cumsum(pnl))

  print(
    trade_results %>%
      select(
        date, entry_time, exit_time, exit_reason, pnl,
        short_put, long_put, short_call, long_call,
        avg_short_iv, avg_long_iv,
        entry_credit, exit_debit,hold_minutes
      ) %>%
      mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 4)))
  )

  cat("\n================ Strategy Summary ================\n")
  cat("Total trades:", nrow(trade_results), "\n")
  cat("Total P&L: $", round(sum(trade_results$pnl, na.rm = TRUE), 2), "\n")
  cat("Average P&L per trade: $", round(mean(trade_results$pnl, na.rm = TRUE), 2), "\n")
  cat("Median P&L per trade: $", round(median(trade_results$pnl, na.rm = TRUE), 2), "\n")
  cat("Win rate:", round(mean(trade_results$pnl > 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 2), "%\n")
  cat("Best trade: $", round(max(trade_results$pnl, na.rm = TRUE), 2), "\n")
  cat("Worst trade: $", round(min(trade_results$pnl, na.rm = TRUE), 2), "\n")

  if (sd(trade_results$pnl, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) {
    cat("Sharpe ratio:", round(
      mean(trade_results$pnl, na.rm = TRUE) / sd(trade_results$pnl, na.rm = TRUE), 4
    ), "\n")
  }

  p1 <- ggplot(trade_results, aes(x = date, y = cumulative_pnl)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(
      title = "Cumulative P&L",
      x = "Date",
      y = "Cumulative P&L"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()

  p2 <- ggplot(trade_results, aes(x = date, y = pnl, fill = pnl > 0)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "green", "FALSE" = "red"),
    labels = c("FALSE" = "Loss", "TRUE" = "Profit"),
    name = "Trade Result"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "P&L by Trade Day",
    x = "Date",
    y = "P&L"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

  print(p1)
  print(p2)

} else {
  cat("No trades executed.\n")
  cat("Try adjusting entry_time_fixed, exit_check_every_mins, iv_rv_ratio, or min_credit.\n")
}
```


```{r}
# Cashflow table
generate_cashflow_table <- function(trade_results, opt_df) {

  if (is.null(trade_results) || nrow(trade_results) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      timestamp = as.POSIXct(character()),
      asset = character(),
      position = integer(),
      vwap_price = numeric(),
      cashflow = numeric(),
      cum_pnl = numeric()
    ))
  }

  get_leg_vwap <- function(trade_date, trade_time, strike_i, type_i) {
    snap <- opt_df %>%
      filter(date == trade_date) %>%
      get_nearest_snapshot(trade_date, trade_time)

    row_i <- snap %>%
      filter(strike == strike_i, type == type_i)

    if (nrow(row_i) == 0) return(NA_real_)

    row_i$close[1]
  }

  cashflow_list <- vector("list", nrow(trade_results))

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(trade_results))) {

    tr <- trade_results[i, ]

    trade_date <- tr$date[1]
    entry_time <- tr$entry_time[1]
    exit_time  <- tr$exit_time[1]

    entry_ts <- ymd_hms(
      paste(as.character(trade_date), entry_time),
      tz = "America/New_York"
    )

    exit_ts <- ymd_hms(
      paste(as.character(trade_date), exit_time),
      tz = "America/New_York"
    )

    K_sp <- tr$short_put[1]
    K_lp <- tr$long_put[1]
    K_sc <- tr$short_call[1]
    K_lc <- tr$long_call[1]

    # Format timestamps as ET strings (Excel-friendly, matches LSTM script)
    entry_ts_str <- format(entry_ts, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")
    exit_ts_str  <- format(exit_ts,  "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")

    # Entry: sell short legs, buy long legs
    entry_rows <- tibble(
      timestamp = c(entry_ts_str, entry_ts_str, entry_ts_str, entry_ts_str),
      asset = c(
        paste0("Put K=", K_sp),
        paste0("Put K=", K_lp),
        paste0("Call K=", K_sc),
        paste0("Call K=", K_lc)
      ),
      position = c(
        -1,  # sell short put
        +1,  # buy long put
        -1,  # sell short call
        +1   # buy long call
      ),
      vwap_price = c(
        get_leg_vwap(trade_date, entry_time, K_sp, "P"),
        get_leg_vwap(trade_date, entry_time, K_lp, "P"),
        get_leg_vwap(trade_date, entry_time, K_sc, "C"),
        get_leg_vwap(trade_date, entry_time, K_lc, "C")
      )
    )

    # Exit: buy back short legs, sell long legs
    exit_rows <- tibble(
      timestamp = c(exit_ts_str, exit_ts_str, exit_ts_str, exit_ts_str),
      asset = c(
        paste0("Put K=", K_sp),
        paste0("Put K=", K_lp),
        paste0("Call K=", K_sc),
        paste0("Call K=", K_lc)
      ),
      position = c(
        +1,  # buy back short put
        -1,  # sell long put
        +1,  # buy back short call
        -1   # sell long call
      ),
      vwap_price = c(
        get_leg_vwap(trade_date, exit_time, K_sp, "P"),
        get_leg_vwap(trade_date, exit_time, K_lp, "P"),
        get_leg_vwap(trade_date, exit_time, K_sc, "C"),
        get_leg_vwap(trade_date, exit_time, K_lc, "C")
      )
    )

    trade_cf <- bind_rows(entry_rows, exit_rows) %>%
      mutate(
        cashflow = -position * vwap_price * 100
      )

    cashflow_list[[i]] <- trade_cf
  }

  cashflow_table <- bind_rows(cashflow_list) %>%
    arrange(timestamp) %>%
    mutate(
      cum_pnl = cumsum(cashflow)
    )

  cashflow_table
}

cashflow_table <- generate_cashflow_table(trade_results, opt_df)

#save
output_path <- file.path(here("cashflow_table_Iron_Condor.csv"))
write_csv(cashflow_table, output_path)

print(head(cashflow_table))

ggsave(
  filename = here("cumulative_pnl_Iron_Condor.png"),
  plot = p1,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

```
